ar_certificate_verify.description: Verify an Argentine DNREC criminal-record certificate using the request code (Solicitud) and security code (Cod. Segur.) printed on the PDF via GET /v2/ar/dnrec/antecedentes. Returns identity fields and the criminal-record statement extracted from the official certificate.

cl_certificate_verify.description: Verify a Chile Registro Civil (SRCEI) certificate using folio and verification code (Código Verificador) via GET /v2/cl/registro-civil/certificado. Returns certificate PDF metadata and conviction-register details when available.
